title: DENTAL - 211info
text: JOSEPH CLINIC DENTAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides preventative and restorative dental services such as dental cleanings fillings, crowns, root canals, and sealants. 401 N Main Street Joseph, OR 97846 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 9am-1pm. Closed Thanksgiving and Christmas. All other holidays 9am-1pm Dental Clinic Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 426-4502 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 426-4502 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or for appointment FEES: Vary depending on service. Accepts Medicare, OHP and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees and payment plans available to individuals with high deductibles or no insurance DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fee LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Union and Wallow Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD BOX FOOD - HARVEST SHARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - WINDING WATERS CLINIC PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
